properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds (default: 86400000 = 24 hours).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g. http://localhost:5173).

properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Directory path for storing uploaded candidate images.
